query:
-- PART 8: Repair wa_conversations preview fields from the TRUE latest message in wa_messages
-- This uses a correlated subquery to find the latest message per conversation
-- and update the preview fields accordingly.

UPDATE wa_conversations wc
INNER JOIN (
  SELECT 
    m.waConversationId,
    m.content,
    m.messageType,
    m.fromMe,
    m.status,
    m.timestamp
  FROM messages m
  INNER JOIN (
    SELECT waConversationId, MAX(id) as maxId
    FROM messages
    WHERE waConversationId IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY waConversationId
  ) latest ON m.id = latest.maxId
) lm ON wc.id = lm.waConversationId
SET 
  wc.lastMessagePreview = LEFT(lm.content, 300),
  wc.lastMessageType = COALESCE(lm.messageType, 'text'),
  wc.lastFromMe = lm.fromMe,
  wc.lastStatus = CASE 
    WHEN lm.fromMe = 1 AND (lm.status IS NULL OR lm.status = '' OR lm.status = 'pending') THEN 'sent'
    WHEN lm.fromMe = 0 THEN 'received'
    ELSE COALESCE(lm.status, 'received')
  END,
  wc.lastMessageAt = lm.timestamp;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4Nn3NsgWfgWMEmv.e05a65be2af1 --database EKvcVicuVoUxTnzjSKzgdk --execute 
-- PART 8: Repair wa_conversations preview fields from the TRUE latest message in wa_messages
-- This uses a correlated subquery to find the latest message per conversation
-- and update the preview fields accordingly.

UPDATE wa_conversations wc
INNER JOIN (
  SELECT 
    m.waConversationId,
    m.content,
    m.messageType,
    m.fromMe,
    m.status,
    m.timestamp
  FROM messages m
  INNER JOIN (
    SELECT waConversationId, MAX(id) as maxId
    FROM messages
    WHERE waConversationId IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY waConversationId
  ) latest ON m.id = latest.maxId
) lm ON wc.id = lm.waConversationId
SET 
  wc.lastMessagePreview = LEFT(lm.content, 300),
  wc.lastMessageType = COALESCE(lm.messageType, 'text'),
  wc.lastFromMe = lm.fromMe,
  wc.lastStatus = CASE 
    WHEN lm.fromMe = 1 AND (lm.status IS NULL OR lm.status = '' OR lm.status = 'pending') THEN 'sent'
    WHEN lm.fromMe = 0 THEN 'received'
    ELSE COALESCE(lm.status, 'received')
  END,
  wc.lastMessageAt = lm.timestamp;
